title: エンティティコレクション
description: Weaver\ORM\Collection\EntityCollection is a typed, immutable-by-default collection returned by repositories and query builders. Every method that would mutate the collection returns a new EntityCollection instance, so the original is never modified. This makes collections safe to pass around without defensive copying.
